name: otto-code
description: Otto: an autonomous AI coding IDE for driving local AI coding agents from anywhere

scripts.dev:server:watch: concurrently --kill-others --names protocol,client,server --prefix-colors yellow,blue,cyan "npm run watch:protocol" "npm run watch:client" "npm run dev:server:raw"
scripts.build:client: npm run build:protocol && npm run build --workspace=@otto-code/client
scripts.build:client:clean: npm run build:protocol:clean && npm run build:clean --workspace=@otto-code/client
scripts.build:server-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:relay && npm run build:client
scripts.build:server-deps:clean: npm run build:highlight:clean && npm run build:relay:clean && npm run build:client:clean
scripts.build:server: npm run build:server-deps && npm run build --workspace=@otto-code/server && npm run build --workspace=@otto-code/cli
scripts.build:server:clean: npm run build:server-deps:clean && npm run build:clean --workspace=@otto-code/server && npm run build:clean --workspace=@otto-code/cli
scripts.build:app-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:client && npm run build --workspace=@otto-code/expo-two-way-audio
scripts.build:app-deps:clean: npm run build:highlight:clean && npm run build:client:clean && npm run build --workspace=@otto-code/expo-two-way-audio
scripts.typecheck:server: npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/cli
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:app-deps:clean && cd packages/app && cross-env OTTO_WEB_PLATFORM=electron npx expo export --platform web && cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=@otto-code/desktop --
scripts.version: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: npm run release:prepare && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/highlight && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/protocol && npm run build:client:clean && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/client && npm run build:server:clean && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@otto-code/cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/highlight && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/relay && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/protocol && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/server && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/cli
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/highlight --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/relay --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/protocol --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/client --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/server --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/cli --access public
scripts.release:publish:beta:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/highlight --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/relay --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/protocol --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/client --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/server --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@otto-code/cli --access public --tag beta
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/highlight --access public && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/relay --access public && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/protocol --access public && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/client --access public && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/server --access public && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/cli --access public
scripts.release:publish:beta: npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/highlight --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/relay --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/protocol --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/client --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/server --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@otto-code/cli --access public --tag beta
scripts.release:beta:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:patch && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:minor && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:major && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:next: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:next && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:promote && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:patch && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:minor && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:major && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
